subcodes.title: The Perfect Human Sentiments and Virtues: Words spoken on 1911-11-23 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: You should all be very happy and thankful to God for the great privilege that is yours. This is purely a spiritual meeting!
subcodes.first_line_orig: شما باید بسیار مسرور باشید و شکر کنید که در چنین
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @human reality created in the image of God, @man's distinction from the animal, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
